name: chr8_OR_cluster
description: Zebrafish olfactory receptor cluster: main OR cluster on chr8 (~40 odorant receptor genes, OR111/OR112 subfamilies). Zebrafish OR repertoire (~150 functional genes) is smaller than mammalian (~400-1300) but spans the same 7TM rhodopsin-like fold. Intra-cluster identity 60-95%, with recent tandem duplicates above 98%. Niimura & Nei 2005 phylogeny identifies 9 OR subfamilies in teleosts.
